notes: Copy this file to configs/dogfood_trace.local.json to opt in locally.
Consent timestamps must be explicit UTC ISO-8601 values such as 2026-06-14T12:00:00Z.
Training consent must be a separate deliberate timestamp from capture consent.
Capture is metadata-only by default. Do not enable raw_text_capture_enabled unless a future audited path exists.
Training row export requires both capture consent and training consent.
Allowed metadata outcomes are accepted, missed, ignored, corrected, and completed.
